Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Team South Africa 4x100m relay quartet to run TODAY: Here’s when

Team South Africa are involved in four sports at the 2024 Paris Olympics on Thursday, 8 August, with all eyes on the athletics track.

Team South Africaare involved infoursports at the2024 Paris OlympicsonThursday, 8 August.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

There’s women’s golf, diving, sport climbing and athletics on the programme.

All eyes will be on the South African men’s 4x100m relay quartet who will run in the first (of two) heats at11:35(SA time).

South Africa are in the same heat as Nigeria, the Netherlands, Great Britain, United States, Japan, Italy and Australia.

Team South Africasuffered a devastating blowto their relay hopes whenBenjamin Richardson, who would’ve been a key member of the four-man squad, limped across the line in his heat in the 200m with an upper leg injury.

Those selected for the South African 4x100m relay squad were: Shaun Maswangani, Bradley Nkoana, Benjamin Richardson, Akani Simbine, Bayanda Walaza, withSineseipho Dambile listed as a reserve.

Team South Africa doesnothave a women’s 4x100m relay team.

As reported byThe South African website, Team SA are37thin the medal table with one gold (Tatjana Smith), one silver (Smith) and two bronzes (men’s Sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly).

The United States (27 golds) lead China (also 25 golds), Australia (18), France (13) and Great Britain in the medal standings.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Women’s shot put qualification, Group A (10:25):Mine de Klerk

Women’s shot put qualification, Group B (10:25):Ashley Erasmus

Women’s 100m hurdles, repechage (10:35):Marione Fourie

Men’s 4x100m relay, heats (11:35):Team SA

Women’s 3m springboard semi-final (10:00):Julia Vincent

Women’s individual, second round (09:33):Paula Reto had an opening 78

Women’s individual, second round (10:22):Ashleigh Buhai had an opening round of 68 which left her second overall

Women’s boulder & Lead, semi-final Lead (10:00):Lauren Mukheiber. Boulder points 0.0
